reviews.comment: Wonderful staff! Mr. Tripp was very professional and knowledgeable. Mr.Ennis replied to my emails promptly and they both helped me with any questions or concerns I had. I would highly recommend them to anyone trying to obtain their BLS Certification! Thank you, Nicholas and Brian! Job well done 👏🏼

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Latrecia!  I'm glad we were able to help.   We strive to make navigating the AHA catalog and paths to certification as easy as possible.  Have a great summer!

reviews.name: accounts/113447197806150947083/locations/8102268822080792056/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjdjQyX3dBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Brian and Nicholas are great. I am on my last week to submit documents for paramedic school and needed to get an AHA BLS cert, which during a pandemic, thought would be impossible. They got me in and certified with a DAY notice. They actually care about helping people out the best they can, especially with the pandemic we are all currently working through. The professionalism and dedication they both demonstrated was a refreshing experience, especially in the health care community.
Will be going back to renew my cert as well as future certs.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, John.   All our instructors are EMTs and are excited to see folks advancing in the field.  Best wishes to you in your new career path.  Admittedly, we are having a bit of a hiccup during this pandemic in our ACLS offerings, but very soon we will be able to offer ACLS and PALS with as much flexibility as we are providing BLS.

reviews.comment: My experience with Coastal Carolina CPR was wonderful.  I felt very prepared for the test at the end after reviewing the videos with the instructor. Great Experience, and thank you Brian, much success to you!
